steps.title: Combine the repeated factor
steps.content:
Both terms on the left include $t+6$, so factor out that repeated expression before solving.

$$5(t+6)-8(t+6)=(5-8)(t+6)$$

$$5(t+6)-8(t+6)=-3(t+6)$$

So the equation is

$$-3(t+6)=45$$

steps.title: Solve for the variable
steps.content: Divide by $-3$, then subtract $6$ to isolate $t$. $$t+6=-15$$ $$t=-21$$ The answer is -21.
